title: Rebearth Remastered
description: The remastered Minecraft Earth themed resource pack!
body:
## The remastered Minecraft Earth themed resource pack!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/rebearth-remastered)




This pack aims to port all of the custom mobs and features that are exclusive to Minecraft Earth to Minecraft Java! Entities: Albino Cow Amber Chicken Ashen Cow Bold Striped Rabbit Bone Spider Bouldering Zombie Bronzed Chicken Brule Cow Cluckshroom Cookie Cow Dairy Cow Fancy Chicken Flecked Sheep Furnace Golem Glow Squid Gold-Crested Chicken Harelequin Rabbit Horned Sheep Inky Sheep Jolly Llama Jumbo Rabbit Lobber Zombie Melon Golem Midnight Chicken Moobloom Moolip Mottled Pig Muddy Foot Rabbit Muddy Pig Pale Pig Piebald pig Pink Footed Pig Pinto Cow Rainbow Sheep Rocky Sheep Skeleton Wolf Spotted pig Skewbald Chicken Sooty Pig Stormy Chicken Sunset Cow Tropical Slime Vested Rabbit Viler Witch Wooly Cow Blocks: Block of Ruby Buttercup Adventure Chests Pink Daisy Rainbow Bed Rainbow Carpet Ruby Ore Rainbow Wool Items: Music Disc - Earth Music Disc - Sprouting Ruby
